name: community-skills
description: Community-sourced skills normalized from alirezarezvani/claude-skills, parcadei/Continuous-Claude-v3, CommandCodeAI/agent-skills, and slavingia/skills, grown since via supply-chain-refresh. 597 skills on disk; the original 426-skill batch (276/103/37/10 per source) passed security audit Apr 6, 2026. Covers engineering, marketing, product, design, security, orchestration, and operations domains. Dormant-by-design: harvested, not published as a marketplace plugin — promoted individually into the registered plugins instead.
